requirements: The system must allow users to log in with Google and custom email accounts.
The platform shall support a persistent shopping cart for guest and logged-in users.
Inventory must be updated in real-time when an order is placed.
Users shall be able to filter products by category, price, and rating.
The layout must be fully responsive and work on mobile/tablet browser.
Order history shall be accessible from the user's dashboard.
Standard shipping and express shipping options must be available at checkout.
System shall support multiple payment gateways including Stripe and PayPal.
Admins must have a dashboard to manage users, orders, and products.
Search results shall prioritize relevant products based on keyword weight.
System shall send automated order confirmation emails to customers.
Coupons and promo codes must be validated before applying to the total.
nfrs: Site must load in under 2 seconds for 95% of users globally.
Platform shall maintain 99.9% uptime per month excluding maintenance.
All credit card data must be handled using PCI-DSS compliant methods.
System must support up to 50,000 concurrent visitors during peak sales.

requirements: Employees must be able to view and download their monthly payslips.
The system shall allow managers to approve leave requests with one click.
The payroll module must calculate taxes automatically based on country rules.
Performance appraisals shall be scheduled annually and tracked by HR.
The org chart must be dynamically generated from data in the employee database.
Automatic notifications shall be sent for upcoming contract renewals.
Multi-level approval workflows must be configurable for expenses.
Onboarding checklists for new hires must include document upload features.
Offboarding process shall automate access revocation across IT assets.
The system must support timesheet submission and tracking per project.
Employee birthdays and work anniversaries shall be displayed on the intranet.
Internal recruitment portal must allow employees to apply for internal roles.
nfrs: Sensitive HR data must be encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3).
System must integrate with existing Active Directory via SAML 2.0.
Dashboard must update in real-time as background tasks complete.
The platform must support high availability with automated disaster recovery.

requirements: Instructors must be able to upload video lectures in MP4 and AVI formats.
The system shall support quizzes with multiple choice and short answer questions.
Certificates must be automatically generated upon course completion.
Students shall be able to track their progress through course modules.
The discussion forum must support threaded comments and user tagging.
System shall allow instructors to set prerequisites for specific courses.
Mobile app synchronization must ensure offline progress is saved when reconnected.
Admins must be able to generate reports on student enrollment and grades.
Course feedback surveys shall be triggered at the end of each module.
Live webinar integration with Zoom and Teams must be supported.
The resource library shall allow downloading of PDF and PPT files.
Notification engine must send reminders for upcoming quiz deadlines.
nfrs: Video streaming must maintain quality for low-bandwidth connections via adaptive bitrate.
The system must support 100,000 active students simultaneously.
Data privacy for student records must strictly follow COPPA guidelines.
Site must achieve WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility standards.

requirements: Agents must be able to upload high-resolution property images and virtual tours.
The map search feature shall display property pins using Mapbox API.
Mortgage calculator must allow users to estimate monthly payments.
Users shall be able to save favorite listings and receive price drop alerts.
The agent portal must allow agents to manage their active and sold listings.
Lead generation forms must send inquiries directly to the listing agent.
Property data shall be synced daily from Multiple Listing Services (MLS) feeds.
Advanced filtering shall include bedroom count, square footage, and school zones.
Neighborhood demographics and safety data must be shown for each property.
Users shall be able to schedule property viewings via an integrated calendar.
Blog and news section for market trends must be manageable via CMS.
System must support both residential and commercial property categories.
nfrs: The portal must process 2 million listings with sub-second search response.
Image processing must automatically generate optimized thumbnails for speed.
Integration with Mapbox must handle 500k map tiles per month without lag.
Security audit logs must track all changes to listing data for compliance.

requirements: The system must track vehicle GPS positions in real-time on a map dashboard.
Maintenance schedules shall be automatically generated based on mileage.
Driver management module must track license expiration and driving hours.
Fuel logs shall allow drivers to record refills and track average fuel economy.
Predictive analytics must flag vehicles and parts likely to fail soon.
Route optimization shall calculate paths for least fuel consumption.
System must send urgent alerts for speeding, harsh braking, and idling.
Inventory of spare parts shall be managed with automatic low-stock alerts.
Incident reporting must allow drivers to upload photos from a mobile app.
Cost analysis reports shall show total cost of ownership per vehicle.
Integration with OBD-II devices must extract diagnostic trouble codes.
Work order management shall track mechanic task time and parts used.
nfrs: GPS location data must be updated every 10 seconds for active vehicles.
The system must handle 5,000 active vehicles concurrently reporting data.
All driver identity data (PII) must be stored in encrypted silos.
Mobile app must function offline and sync when 4G/LTE is available.
